'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=HW_RxHsZW.ofp1bLqTiRwfqzUe9tahw.5cedQAPjENM-1774550385-1.0.1.1-kSILjfqReSsdpiGyw.fh6SU3iZ7yd_buFFngq3c5fNU"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
